title: Session Trace Proof Program

included: intake --submit appends one trace step per node transition
per-node evidence links to session trace metadata and trace digest
verify-session validates target-set + session-chain + session-trace + canary scan
runtime profile includes mutable session trace and embedded verify-session checks it

notes: JSON IR remains canonical; ordo-code explains; session-trace proves.
To avoid cyclic digest dependencies, snapshots keep the tamper-evident chain and evidence/submit reports record the post-append trace digest.
